description: forward scheduling from a product-receipt trigger computes each due date cited to a rule and anchor

tasks.rule: draft due 7 business days after product receipt

assertions: the first-cut due date is 7 business days after 2026-07-01
each date cites its rule and anchor event
all date math is offline (cited to tools/tasks.py)
weekends are excluded from the business-day count

description: backward scheduling from a hard publish date yields the latest start for each upstream step
assertions: each upstream step has a latest-start date that keeps the publish date reachable
the chain is walked backward from the publish date
dates are cited to the rule and the publish anchor

description: a chain that cannot fit the deadline flags a negative-slack conflict rather than inventing a fit
assertions: feasibility is infeasible when the chain cannot fit before the deadline
the negative-slack conflict is reported with the shortfall
no dates are silently compressed to force a fit
